source.title: [re:DEFINICIJA] Marko Matijašević: Kako primiti financijski blagoslov (ep. 5)

summary.title_hr: [re:DEFINICIJA] Marko Matijašević: Kako primiti financijski blagoslov (ep. 5)
summary.abstract_hr: U ovoj epizodi podcasta 'Redefinicija', gost Marko Matijašević, predsjednik udruge 'Eho', dijeli svoja iskustva o identitetu, liderstvu, partnerskim odnosima i financijama. Razgovor obuhvaća važnost kontinuiranog osobnog razvoja, izazove bračnog života i potrebu za iskrenom komunikacijom. Poseban naglasak stavljen je na mudro upravljanje novcem u braku i duhovni princip desetine kao puta do blagoslova, potičući slušatelje na preispitivanje vlastitih obrazaca ponašanja.
key_points: Liderstvo zahtijeva neprestano educiranje i razvoj, a muškarci kao glave obitelji trebaju raditi na sebi jer djeca upijaju njihove obrasce ponašanja.
Strah od odbijanja i preuzimanja odgovornosti često sprječava muškarce u pristupanju djevojkama i novim pothvatima.
Brak otključava neočekivane izazove i obrasce ponašanja, stoga je ključno razumijevanje, podrška i otvorena komunikacija među supružnicima.
Tajnost i razdvojene financije glavni su uzroci problema u braku, dok zajedničko upravljanje novcem i transparentnost doprinose zadovoljstvu u odnosu.
Desetina je biblijski princip davanja za evangelizaciju i izgradnju 'hrama', a Bog poziva na kušanje Njegovog blagoslova kroz vjerno davanje.
Odnos prema novcu test je vjernosti i pokazuje što nam je zaista važno, a ne treba brkati milostinju s desetinom.
Preporučuje se prepoznavanje i mijenjanje neželjenih obrazaca ponašanja u svim aspektima života, od partnerskih odnosa do financija.
summary.title_en: [re:DEFINITION] Marko Matijašević: How to receive financial blessing (ep. 5)
summary.abstract_en: In this episode of the podcast 'Redefinicija', guest Marko Matijašević, president of the association 'Eho', shares his experiences about identity, leadership, partner relationships, and finances. The conversation covers the importance of continuous personal development, the challenges of married life, and the need for honest communication. Special emphasis is placed on wise money management in marriage and the spiritual principle of tithing as a path to blessing, encouraging listeners to re-examine their own patterns of behavior.
key_points_en: Leadership requires constant education and development, and men as heads of families should work on themselves because children absorb their patterns of behavior.
Fear of rejection and taking on responsibility often prevents men from approaching girls and new endeavors.
Marriage unlocks unexpected challenges and patterns of behavior, therefore understanding, support, and open communication between spouses are crucial.
Secrecy and separate finances are the main causes of problems in marriage, while joint money management and transparency contribute to satisfaction in the relationship.
Tithe is a biblical principle of giving for evangelization and the building of the 'temple', and God calls to test His blessing through faithful giving.
The relationship to money is a test of faithfulness and shows what is truly important to us, and one should not confuse alms with tithe.
It is recommended to recognize and change undesired patterns of behavior in all aspects of life, from partner relationships to finances.
